title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains how test-time compute and chain of thought techniques enable AI models to pause and reason through harder problems. The video demonstrates how LLMs use deliberate thinking processes to improve accuracy on complex tasks.
